title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sergeant Frog takes extreme steps to prepare his soldiers for the harsh winter attack. Meanwhile, Keroro simply receives his bonus cheque.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Granny Chiyo uses the Reanimation Jutsu to revive Gaara, imparting her wisdom to the young ninja in the process and sacrificing herself for the next generation.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto returns stronger to face deadly foes, save his friends, and fulfill his destiny in this action-packed anime journey filled with loyalty, growth, and ninja values.

desc: Momoka, Koyuki, and Keroro have a fierce competition to decide who will get to accompany the Hinata family on their trip.

desc: Sergeant Keroro and his group are eager to celebrate Natsumi's birthday. However, she claims that she does not like to receive gifts as they are childish.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sgt Frog eagerly helps prepare for New Year celebrations with his friends. However, he realises too late that he has forgotten to complete his assigned homework.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

title: Black Clover
desc: In the Clover Kingdom, where every person knows magic, orphans Asta and Yuno strive to become the Wizard King, the greatest magic user. However, Asta knows no magic, while Yuno harnesses huge talent.

title: Black Clover
desc: Yuno receives a legendary grimoire with a four-leaf clover. When a dacoit named Revchi comes to steal it, Asta comes to Yuno's rescue.

title: Black Clover
desc: Asta and Yuno spend six months training for the upcoming Magic Knights Entrance Exam. Everyone thinks Yuno is sure to pass, but worries that Asta is simply wasting his time.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: An explosive appears out of nowhere when Rantarou and the others are cleaning. Meanwhile, Ikeda Saburouji senpai has been training.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Yamabuki pays a visit to Yuki, Tomomi and Oshige to savor the delicious dishes in the Dining Hall Lady's. Nonetheless, the Dining Hall Lady had to unexpectedly leave for a business trip that day.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst returning to Ninjutsu Academy, Sanjirou and Isuke lose their way in the forest. As they try to find an exit, they happen upon an isolated house.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Yuki and her friends are assigned the task of following Rantaro, Kirimaru and Shinbei as homework. However, they feel that the task at hand is too easy.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Although disguised as Fuwa Raizou, Hachiya Sabrou is spotted by Rantarou and the others whilst deciding on what he should have for lunch.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After learning of a secret basement from Happousai, Ibuki visits Ninjutsu Academy. Meanwhile, Rantarou and the others investigate the rumour.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.
